nasb.text: And when He had said this, He showed them both His hands and His side. The disciples then rejoiced when they saw the Lord.

esv.text: When he had said this, he showed them his hands and his side. Then the disciples were glad when they saw the Lord.

cnv.text: 說了這話，就把手和肋旁給他們看。門徒看見主，就歡喜了。

ccb.text: 说完，让他们看祂的手和肋旁。门徒看见主，十分欢喜。

csbs.text: 说了这话，他把手和肋旁给他们看。门徒们看见了主，就欢喜。
